key.name: shape
key.description: Shape of the camera overlay: 'circle' or 'rounded-rect'

key.name: flipped
key.description: Whether the camera feed is horizontally flipped

key.name: window-width
key.description: Compact mode window width in pixels

key.name: window-height
key.description: Compact mode window height in pixels

key.name: fit-mode
key.description: How the video fits in the window: 'cover', 'contain', or 'fill'

key.name: camera-id
key.description: PipeWire object serial of the selected camera device
